name: Calendar Agenda
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Shows an agenda of your upcoming calendar events in the sidebar.

position.label: Widget position
position.description: Where the agenda appears. 'Email reading pane' shows it beside an open email. Changing this may require reloading the plugin.

daysAhead.label: Days to look ahead
daysAhead.description: How many days of upcoming events to include in the agenda.

maxEvents.label: Maximum events
maxEvents.description: Cap on how many events are shown at once.

refreshMinutes.label: Auto-refresh interval (minutes)
refreshMinutes.description: How often the agenda re-fetches in the background. It also refreshes immediately whenever you change an event.
